literal: To sit in one place and watch people and activities passing by.
To remain tuned in or attentive for upcoming information or developments.
To make a dismissive gesture or motion to indicate rejection or disregard.
To raise a white flag or similar to signal surrender or cease fighting.

relabelled_senses.definition: To masturbate (male), used as crude slang.

literal: no literal meaning
A long time ago; in the distant past.
Unable to escape from a paper bag, literally meaning completely incapable or inept.
A sister who is weak, physically or constitutionally less strong.
A weak sister, literally a female sibling who is weak or feeble.
To deliberately perform tasks poorly or feign inability.
To accept the current state of affairs as it is.
To openly show one's emotions or feelings.
To stay longer than welcome as a guest or visitor.
To look at someone or something through rose-colored glasses, literally meaning to see with pink-tinted lenses.
To wear sackcloth and ashes, literally meaning to dress in coarse cloth and cover oneself with ashes as a sign of mourning or repentance.
To wear many hats, literally meaning to have multiple hats on one's head at the same time.
To get in through sly or indirect means.
To duck out, literally meaning to lower one's head quickly to avoid something.
To weed out, literally meaning to remove unwanted plants from a garden.
To happen every week, literally meaning occurring on a weekly basis.
